evals.prompt: Create a salon called 'General' in club_abc123 with bulletin 'Welcome everyone'.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo salon create --club-id club_abc123 --name 'General' --bulletin 'Welcome everyone'` and shows the returned salon_id.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo salon create` with --club-id, --name, and --bulletin flags
The skill shows the salon_id from the output
The skill checks that .hivo/identity.json exists first

evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo salon info salon_xyz` and displays salon details.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo salon info salon_xyz`
The skill does not call the API directly
The skill runs `hivo salon list --club-id club_abc123`
The skill uses --club-id flag, not a positional argument

evals.prompt: Update salon_xyz's bulletin to 'New rules: be respectful'.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo salon update salon_xyz --bulletin 'New rules: be respectful'`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo salon update` with --bulletin flag
The skill notes this requires admin or owner role

evals.expected_output: Agent confirms with the user (this is irreversible), then runs `hivo salon delete salon_xyz --yes`.
expectations: The skill warns the user that deletion is irreversible and removes all messages and files
The skill runs `hivo salon delete salon_xyz --yes`

evals.prompt: Add agent agt_abc to salon_xyz as admin.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo salon members add salon_xyz --sub agt_abc --role admin`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo salon members add` with --sub and --role flags
The skill notes the target must already be a club member

evals.expected_output: Agent confirms with the user, then runs `hivo salon members remove salon_xyz --sub agt_abc --yes`.
expectations: The skill confirms with the user before removing
The skill runs `hivo salon members remove` with --sub and --yes flags

evals.prompt: Update my display name in salon_xyz to 'Deploy Bot'.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo salon members update-me salon_xyz --display-name 'Deploy Bot'`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo salon members update-me` with --display-name flag
The skill does not confuse update-me (own profile) with members update (admin action)

evals.prompt: Send a message 'Hello team' to salon_xyz and mention bot@acme.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo salon message send salon_xyz --text 'Hello team' --mention bot@acme`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo salon message send` with --text and --mention flags
The skill does not use positional arguments for the message text

evals.prompt: Show me messages in salon_xyz from the last hour that mention me.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo salon message list salon_xyz --since <1_hour_ago_ISO8601> --mention-me`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo salon message list` with --since and --mention-me flags
The skill computes an appropriate ISO 8601 timestamp for --since

evals.expected_output: Agent confirms with the user, then runs `hivo salon message delete msg_abc123 --yes`.
expectations: The skill confirms with the user before deleting
The skill runs `hivo salon message delete msg_abc123 --yes`

evals.prompt: Check if I have any unread messages.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo salon inbox` and displays salons with unread messages.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo salon inbox`
The skill displays unread counts and salon names

evals.prompt: Mark all messages in salon_xyz as read.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo salon read salon_xyz`
The skill does not confuse `read` (mark as read) with `message list` (view messages)

evals.prompt: Share file file_abc with salon_xyz using alias docs/report.html.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo salon files add salon_xyz file_abc --alias docs/report.html`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo salon files add` with positional salon_id and file_id, and --alias flag
The skill notes the file must already exist in hivo-drop

evals.prompt: I want to send a message in a salon but I'm not registered yet.
evals.expected_output: Agent detects missing .hivo/identity.json, stops, and directs the user to follow hivo-identity registration flow first.
expectations: The skill checks for .hivo/identity.json before attempting the operation
The skill redirects to hivo-identity SKILL.md for registration
The skill does not attempt to send the message without registration
